heading: Minimizing disruptions to existing MBDA Business Center program
label: 9525 Minimizing disruptions to existing MBDA Business Center program
text: The Under Secretary shall ensure that each Federal assistance award made under the Business Centers program of the Agency, as is in effect on the day before , is carried out in a manner that, to the greatest extent practicable, prevents disruption of any activity carried out under that award.November 15, 2021
